findings.title: AuthService bypasses repository abstraction
findings.runtime_scope_justification: src/auth/service.py is production runtime code not exposed to untrusted input.
findings.failure_mode_justification: Bypassing the repository skips caching and audit logging.
findings.evidence_quality_justification: Lines 42-58 show a direct DB query; AuthRepository provides the intended abstraction.
findings.trace_origin_justification: Traced within auth module: AuthService.authenticate() calls session.query() directly.
